claim: Model improvements alone don't guarantee product success; integration, UX, and reliability matter equally for production AI systems
actionable: When evaluating AI advances, assess not just model capability but integration complexity, latency, and user experience tradeoffs

claim: Production systems require reliability, cost efficiency, and predictability alongside raw capability; models are means to product outcomes, not ends
actionable: Optimize for end-to-end product quality: latency, cost per inference, reliability, not just accuracy metrics
